tasks.title: Build Claude terminal plugin
tasks.desc: Claude Code hooks that write session events (phase, tool, task_id) to Supabase claude_events
tasks.overview: A Claude Code plugin installed via hooks that fires on PostToolUse and Stop events. Parses context to detect task ID from message tags, writes structured events to Supabase, and maintains local session state between hook invocations.
criteria: PostToolUse hook writes phase + summary to claude_events
Stop hook writes ended event and clears local state
Task ID parsed from #t1 or 'working on task t1' in messages
Session state persisted between hook invocations via JSON file
install.js registers hooks in Claude Code settings

tasks.title: ClaudeStatusBar component
tasks.desc: Header bar showing live Claude session status — current phase, active task, and session duration
tasks.overview: Reads from ClaudeSessionContext (Supabase real-time) and renders a minimal status indicator in the app header. Shows the current phase (exploring, implementing, running, etc.) and which task Claude is working on.
criteria: Phase label updates in real-time from Supabase subscription
Active task ID displayed when present
Renders nothing when no active Claude session
No layout shift when session starts or ends

tasks.title: SessionLog view
tasks.desc: Dedicated /session route showing a chronological feed of all Claude events for the current session
tasks.overview: A scrollable timeline of claude_events rows — each entry shows the phase, tool used, summary, and timestamp. Grouped by session. Useful for reviewing what Claude did during a work session.
criteria: Events displayed in chronological order
Phase shown as a colored badge
Tool name and summary shown per event
New events append in real-time without full reload

tasks.title: Tickets-first MVP — hide board
tasks.desc: Make /tickets the default route, remove Board from nav, simplify data model to tasks + devs only
tasks.overview: The board view was useful for exploring the graph model but the MVP should focus on the tickets list. Remove agent/sub-agent nodes from the type system and data. Redirect / to /tickets. Keep the board route but remove it from navigation.
criteria: / redirects to /tickets
Board tab removed from header nav
Agent and sub-agent types removed from types.ts
Sample data reflects actual project work
App builds without TypeScript errors

tasks.title: Redesign sample data
tasks.desc: Replace generic e-commerce tasks with tasks that reflect this actual project
tasks.overview: The sample data shipped with the app was a placeholder (auth refactor, checkout tests, CI/CD). Replace it with data that demonstrates the real product — a PM tool with Claude integration — so stakeholders immediately understand what they are looking at.
criteria: All tasks reference real work on this project
Single developer: Advaith Nair
No agent or sub-agent nodes
Statuses reflect actual current state

tasks.title: Supabase real-time AI indicator
tasks.desc: Ticket cards show a live 'Claude active' badge when the plugin detects an active Claude session on that task
tasks.overview: ClaudeSessionContext subscribes to claude_events in Supabase and exposes activeTaskId. TicketsView already reads this and renders the badge — this task covers verifying the end-to-end flow works: tag a task in a Claude message, confirm the badge appears on that ticket card.
criteria: Tagging #t2 in Claude message activates badge on t2 ticket card
Badge disappears when Claude session ends
Works across browser tabs (real-time subscription)
No badge shown when no active session

developers.name: Advaith Nair
developers.desc: Building Symphony PM — a Jira-style project tracker with a Claude Code plugin that watches developer activity in real-time and surfaces it in the UI.
criteria: Feature code merged to Remake branch
App builds without TypeScript errors
Supabase schema matches plugin expectations
Ticket moved to Done
outputs: Plugin hooks registered in Claude Code
